label: Mega Data Centers Threaten Great Lakes Water

comments.text: we’re gonna be confronting this issue for the rest of our lives, imo, so no reason to get mega-hot about one example, but: this is about tech trying to get a foot in with the Great Lakes water supply, not much different from FoxConn
